mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nx_machine_alert_threshold
AND nx_at_device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nx_machine_alert_threshold ( nx_at_device_id, nx_at_level, nx_at_threshold, nx_at_message, nx_at_enable, nx_at_create_time ) VALUES ( #{nxAtDeviceId}, #{nxAtLevel}, #{nxAtThreshold}, #{nxAtMessage}, #{nxAtEnable}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO nx_machine_alert_threshold (nx_at_device_id, nx_at_level, nx_at_threshold, nx_at_message, nx_at_enable, nx_at_create_time) VALUES
(#{item.nxAtDeviceId}, #{item.nxAtLevel}, #{item.nxAtThreshold}, #{item.nxAtMessage}, #{item.nxAtEnable}, NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM nx_machine_alert_threshold WHERE nx_at_id IN
#{nxAtId}
